fix_summary: The booking service now multiplies flight price by passenger count in `create_booking`, and the test suite includes coverage for both single- and multi-passenger bookings. Automated tests passed (8/8), indicating the localized pricing fix is working as intended.
approval_reasons: The core arithmetic bug was fixed at the source in `create_booking` by changing addition to multiplication.
Relevant service tests were added/updated to verify the multi-passenger case and preserve single-passenger behavior.
Automated test results passed, so the implementation meets the acceptance criteria.
